name: 04_js_config_retry_limit
description: Fork renames variable; upstream bumps value (scenario 3)
goose_prompt_control: There is a merge conflict in config.js. Keep fork terminology retryLimit with upstream value 3. Do not leave conflict markers.
goose_prompt_experiment: There is a merge conflict in config.js. Blend retryLimit (fork) with the new retry count 3 (upstream). Do not leave conflict markers.
